title: AP Dwcra Groups Lead Others In Country With Rs 15,917 cr Savings
description: AP women are surging ahead of others in share marketing investments. Compared to March 2021, the Demat accounts in October 2025 have recorded a 296% growth. Of the total Demat accounts, 18.52% belong to women. In March 2021, women's accounts stood at 2,47,377, it rose to 11,49,317 by October 31, 2025. The total number of Demat accounts increased from 15,58,541 to 61,69,875
